x_snc_airop_check_definition.ai_justification: Now Assist features ship with each release. Running an outdated release means missing AI capabilities, security patches affecting Now Assist, and potential incompatibilities with Now Assist configurations.
x_snc_airop_check_definition.remediation_guidance: Plan an upgrade to the latest Generally Available release (Zurich or newer). Now Assist capabilities expand with each release — staying current maximizes AI feature availability. Engage ServiceNow account team for upgrade planning assistance.
